documentation.text:
@dev Withdraw **all** USDC for contract upgrade / migration. Resets on-chain pool and vault
      liability counters (per-user `tradingVaultBalances` mappings are not iterated).
      Only use when deprecating this contract — users must claim on the new deployment.
      Callable by deployer or superAdmin.
@dev Set superAdmin address

@dev Manage on-chain admins (deployer only).
 Admins can operate Admin-page contract functions (resolve/update markets, set claimables, set jackpot balances).
@dev Get jackpot balance for user
@dev Get claimable balance for user
@dev User deposits USDC into the trading vault (custody) for orderbook flow.

@dev Withdraw from trading vault using the same EIP-191 signer pattern as jackpot withdraw.
 Backend authorizes amount (must not exceed off-chain computed withdrawable).
@dev Single USDC pull; credits YES/NO pools per outcome (on-chain reference + settlement accounting).

@dev After market resolution: sweep remaining trading-vault collateral for this market into
      `claimPredictionWinsPool` and clear on-chain positions so users cannot withdraw vault
      funds that belong in the claim pool (prevents double payout with claimOrderbookPositionWithAuth).
      Conservation: sum(vaultDelta) + collateralToClaimPool == 0.
@dev USDC held by this contract and internal pool balances (for super-admin treasury view).

devdoc.details: Comprehensive smart contract for prediction market platform Handles market creation, trading, boost predictions, and jackpot management

ECDSAInvalidSignatureLength(uint256).details: The signature has an invalid length.

ECDSAInvalidSignatureS(bytes32).details: The signature has an S value that is in the upper half order.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

addBoostStake(uint256,string,uint256).details: Add more stake to existing boost prediction

addLiquidity(uint256,string,uint256).details: Add initial liquidity to a market option

applyOrderbookSettlements(uint256,(addre.details: Apply batched vault + position updates after off-chain matching.      Platform fee share credits `claimPredictionWinsPool`; free-jackpot fee share credits `jackpotPool` (same split as superadmin Settings). Conservation: sum(vaultDelta) + feeToClaimPool + feeToJackpotPool == 0 (USDC units).

batchAddOrderbookLiquidity(uint256,(stri.details: Single USDC pull; credits YES/NO pools per outcome (on-chain reference + settlement accounting).

claimOrderbookPositionWithAuth(uint256,u.details: Claim resolved orderbook position: eligibility and payout amount are enforced off-chain via signature.

claimPredictionWins(uint256,bool).details: Claim prediction winnings (Boost or Market) for a resolved market.

params.isBoost: true to claim boost winnings, false to claim market winnings. Pays from claimPredictionWinsPool.

claimPredictionWinsWithAuth(uint256,bool.details: Claim boost or market winnings using a signature from `claimAuthSigner`. Amount must match what the backend encoded (off-chain payout). Replaces relying on claimableBoost / claimableMarket mappings for normal user flow.

createMarket(bool,string[]).details: Create a new market (match or poll)

params.isPoll: true if poll, false if match

depositTradingVault(uint256).details: User deposits USDC into the trading vault (custody) for orderbook flow.

finalizeResolvedMarketSettlements(uint25.details: After market resolution: sweep remaining trading-vault collateral for this market into      `claimPredictionWinsPool` and clear on-chain positions so users cannot withdraw vault      funds that belong in the claim pool (prevents double payout with claimOrderbookPositionWithAuth).      Conservation: sum(vaultDelta) + collateralToClaimPool == 0.

fundClaimPredictionWinsPool(uint256).details: Fund the claim prediction wins pool (super admin or deployer).

getMarketOptions(uint256).details: Get options for a market (so frontend can validate outcome before staking)

getPrice(uint256,string).details: Get current price for an option (in basis points)

getTreasurySnapshot().details: USDC held by this contract and internal pool balances (for super-admin treasury view).

migrateAllFundsForUpgrade(address).details: Withdraw **all** USDC for contract upgrade / migration. Resets on-chain pool and vault      liability counters (per-user `tradingVaultBalances` mappings are not iterated).      Only use when deprecating this contract — users must claim on the new deployment.      Callable by deployer or superAdmin.

setAdmin(address,bool).details: Manage on-chain admins (deployer only). Admins can operate Admin-page contract functions (resolve/update markets, set claimables, set jackpot balances).

setClaimAuthSigner(address).details: Set wallet whose signatures authorize user claims (off-chain payout amount). Use the same key as CLAIM_AUTH_PRIVATE_KEY on the API.

setClaimableBalance(uint256,address,uint.details: Set claimable balance for a user (legacy; prefer setClaimableBoost/setClaimableMarket)

setClaimableBoost(uint256,address,uint25.details: Set claimable boost amount for a user (called after resolution).

setClaimableMarket(uint256,address,uint2.details: Set claimable market amount for a user (called after resolution).

setJackpotBalance(address,uint256).details: Set user's jackpot balance (called by backend)

stakeBoost(uint256,string,uint256).details: Stake USDC for boost prediction. Net stake + platform fee fund `claimPredictionWinsPool`      (same pool `claimPredictionWinsWithAuth` pays from); jackpot fee funds `jackpotPool`.

transferFunds(address,uint256).details: Transfer surplus USDC (above claim pool + jackpot + user vault liabilities).      Callable by deployer or superAdmin. For full contract drain before upgrade, use      `migrateAllFundsForUpgrade`.

withdrawBoostStake(uint256,string,uint25.details: Withdraw stake from boost prediction (only before resolution)

withdrawFromClaimPredictionWinsPool(addr.details: Withdraw from claim prediction wins pool (deployer only).

withdrawJackpotWithAuth(uint256,bytes32,.details: Withdraw from jackpot pool using a signature from `claimAuthSigner`. Does not use per-user on-chain jackpot balances.

withdrawTradingVaultWithAuth(uint256,byt.details: Withdraw from trading vault using the same EIP-191 signer pattern as jackpot withdraw. Backend authorizes amount (must not exceed off-chain computed withdrawable).

claimPredictionWinsPool.details: Pool for paying Boost and Market prediction wins; funded by deployer and by boost stakes

claimAuthSigner().notice: Backend / ops wallet that signs authorized claims (set by deployer)

orderbookLiquidityYes(uint256,string).notice: On-chain reference liquidity for YES/NO books per outcome option (USDC units)

totalTradingVaultLiabilities().notice: Sum of all tradingVaultBalances — used to prevent superAdmin draining user vault collateral

tradingVaultBalances(address).notice: USDC credited to users for orderbook trading (deposit / settlement)

usdc().notice: Platform currency token (Base USDC). All pools and payouts are denominated in this token.

usedAuthPredictionClaims(bytes32).notice: Replay protection for signature-based prediction claims

usedJackpotWithdrawNonces(bytes32).notice: Replay protection for signature-based jackpot withdrawals

usedOrderbookClaimKeys(bytes32).notice: Replay for orderbook position claims (separate from boost/market auth key space)
